title: Chelympics
html:
Stub. First mentioned in 2025 05 09 initiation to chelympics 1 beer 1 shot per person.

A drinking-olympics ritual run by Yahir's friend group: 1 beer + 1 shot entry, seven scored events (flip cup, card-stack, dart, cup pong, Kahoot, beer ball, face frenzy, karaoke), a halftime ritual led by Charis, and point deductions for falls / throw-ups.
